dataset_title: Individualized fMRI-guided rTMS combined with Self-System Therapy versus mindfulness exercises in treatment-resistant depression
summary_en: This OpenNeuro dataset (ds008064.v1.0.0) was only published/registered on 2026-06-29, i.e. about three weeks before this search (2026-07-21). Resolving the DOI in OpenAlex returns work id W7166566292 with cited_by_count = 0 and referenced_works_count = 0 -- no works currently cite this dataset record. A direct OpenAlex citation-graph query (filter=cites:W7166566292) was run live and returned zero results (meta.count = 0), confirming no works currently cite this dataset. As a fallback/corroboration, Europe PMC was searched for the dataset identifier '"ds008064"' and returned 0 hits, confirming no indexed literature currently references this specific dataset accession. Conclusion: as of 2026-07-21, no published work has yet used this specific OpenNeuro dataset. The dataset represents genuine white space -- the citation graph is empty, consistent with its very recent (~3-week-old) publication date, leaving essentially no time for secondary analyses to be produced, reviewed, and indexed.
notes: Both the OpenAlex filter=cites:W7166566292 query and a Europe PMC search on "ds008064" returned zero results, independently corroborating the work's own cited_by_count=0 field. No rate-limit issues were encountered in this session.
